name: China Zhenhua (Group) Science & Technology Co., Ltd
summary: China Zhenhua (Group) Science & Technology Co., Ltd produces and sells electronic components in China. It operates through three segments: New Electronic Components, Dedicated Complete Machines and Systems, and Modern Services. The company offers chip tantalum capacitors, chip resistors, chip inductors, chip diodes, transistors, and thick film hybrid integrated circuits, as well as switches, miniature relays, contactors, semiconductor discrete devices, high voltage vacuum interrupters, and Li-ion power battery products. It also provides complete communication machines for mobile communication terminal products; integrated circuits and components of lithium ion batteries; and high voltage vacuum switching tubes. In addition, the company engages in power supply and property leasing businesses. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Guiyang, China.
